CellxGene Replication: Cell Density vs Metabolic Rate

Validation of Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan findings using Whole Human Brain Atlas

Background

This analysis replicates the findings from Hanson et al. (2018), Karlsen & Pakkenberg (2011), and Morgan et al. (2014) using NEW data from the Whole Human Brain Atlas via CellxGene.

Original findings: - Astrocyte density: r = 0.968, p = .002 - Oligodendrocyte density: r = 0.897, p = .016 - Microglia density: r = 0.937, p = .006 - Total glia density: r = 0.708, p = .075 (NS)

Load CellxGene Data

# Set working directory
setwd("C:\\Users\\michaelproulx\\Downloads\\1A analyses metabol rates regions\\1A analyses metabol rates regions\\R")

# Load CellxGene data (now relative to working directory)
cellxgene_data <- read.csv(
  "cellxgene_integration\\ei_analysis\\data\\cortical\\followup_analyses\\subregions_with_cell_composition.csv",
  header = TRUE
)

# Display summary
cat("=== CELLXGENE DATA SUMMARY ===\n")
## === CELLXGENE DATA SUMMARY ===
cat("Number of cortical subregions:", nrow(cellxgene_data), "\n")
## Number of cortical subregions: 20
cat("Regions:", paste(cellxgene_data$Region, collapse=", "), "\n\n")
## Regions: V1C, Ig, M1C, V2, MTG, A1C, A13, A19, A43, A5-A7, A38, S1C, FI, A25, STG, A44-A45, A46, A40, ITG, A32
# Show first few rows
kable(head(cellxgene_data[, c("Region", "Lobe", "rCMRGlc_Mean", "Total_Neuron",
                               "Astrocyte", "Oligodendrocyte", "Microglia", "Total_Glia")]),
      caption = "CellxGene Cell Composition Data (First 6 Regions)")
CellxGene Cell Composition Data (First 6 Regions)
Region Lobe rCMRGlc_Mean Total_Neuron Astrocyte Oligodendrocyte Microglia Total_Glia
V1C Occipital_lobe 35.8 30551 847 1740 245 2832
Ig Insular_lobe 30.3 35117 1157 2039 357 3553
M1C Frontal_lobe 35.3 108076 1492 4406 274 6172
V2 Occipital_lobe 35.8 29609 903 1766 235 2904
MTG Temporal_lobe 30.5 84759 4947 14617 2241 21805
A1C Temporal_lobe 30.5 30102 666 1566 311 2543

Calculate Densities

Since CellxGene provides cell counts, we need to calculate densities. We’ll express as proportions (cells per 10,000 total cells) to match the concept of “density.”

# Calculate cell densities as proportions
cellxgene_data$Total_Cells_All <- cellxgene_data$Total_Neuron + cellxgene_data$Total_Glia

# Densities per 10,000 cells
cellxgene_data$Neuron_Density <- (cellxgene_data$Total_Neuron / cellxgene_data$Total_Cells_All) * 10000
cellxgene_data$Glia_Density <- (cellxgene_data$Total_Glia / cellxgene_data$Total_Cells_All) * 10000
cellxgene_data$Astrocyte_Density <- (cellxgene_data$Astrocyte / cellxgene_data$Total_Cells_All) * 10000
cellxgene_data$Oligodendrocyte_Density <- (cellxgene_data$Oligodendrocyte / cellxgene_data$Total_Cells_All) * 10000
cellxgene_data$Microglia_Density <- (cellxgene_data$Microglia / cellxgene_data$Total_Cells_All) * 10000
cellxgene_data$GliaNeuron_Ratio <- cellxgene_data$Glia_Density / cellxgene_data$Neuron_Density

# Show calculated densities
kable(head(cellxgene_data[, c("Region", "rCMRGlc_Mean", "Neuron_Density", "Glia_Density",
                               "Astrocyte_Density", "Oligodendrocyte_Density", "Microglia_Density")]),
      caption = "Calculated Cell Densities (per 10,000 cells)",
      digits = 2)
Calculated Cell Densities (per 10,000 cells)
Region rCMRGlc_Mean Neuron_Density Glia_Density Astrocyte_Density Oligodendrocyte_Density Microglia_Density
V1C 35.8 9151.66 848.34 253.72 521.22 73.39
Ig 30.3 9081.20 918.80 299.20 527.28 92.32
M1C 35.3 9459.77 540.23 130.59 385.65 23.98
V2 35.8 9106.82 893.18 277.74 543.17 72.28
MTG 30.5 7953.81 2046.19 464.23 1371.66 210.30
A1C 30.5 9221.01 778.99 204.01 479.71 95.27

Aggregate by Lobe

To better match the original analysis (which used lobes), let’s aggregate to lobe level.

library(dplyr)

# Aggregate to lobe level (weighted by total cells)
lobe_data <- cellxgene_data %>%
  group_by(Lobe) %>%
  summarise(
    rCMRGlc_Mean = first(rCMRGlc_Mean),  # Same within lobe
    n_regions = n(),

    # Sum counts
    Total_Neuron = sum(Total_Neuron),
    Total_Glia = sum(Total_Glia),
    Astrocyte = sum(Astrocyte),
    Oligodendrocyte = sum(Oligodendrocyte),
    Microglia = sum(Microglia),
    Total_Cells = sum(Total_Cells_All),

    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Calculate densities per 10,000 cells
    Neuron_Density = (Total_Neuron / Total_Cells) * 10000,
    Glia_Density = (Total_Glia / Total_Cells) * 10000,
    Astrocyte_Density = (Astrocyte / Total_Cells) * 10000,
    Oligodendrocyte_Density = (Oligodendrocyte / Total_Cells) * 10000,
    Microglia_Density = (Microglia / Total_Cells) * 10000,
    GliaNeuron_Ratio = Glia_Density / Neuron_Density
  )

cat("\n=== LOBE-LEVEL DATA ===\n")
## 
## === LOBE-LEVEL DATA ===
print(lobe_data)
## # A tibble: 5 × 15
##   Lobe  rCMRGlc_Mean n_regions Total_Neuron Total_Glia Astrocyte Oligodendrocyte
##   <chr>        <dbl>     <int>        <int>      <int>     <int>           <int>
## 1 Fron…         35.3         6       260981      18690      5726           11500
## 2 Insu…         30.3         2        66852       5786      1779            3309
## 3 Occi…         35.8         3        86885       8591      2569            5286
## 4 Pari…         35.8         4       142395      12153      3506            7346
## 5 Temp…         30.5         5       202853      43428      9919           29092
## # ℹ 8 more variables: Microglia <int>, Total_Cells <int>, Neuron_Density <dbl>,
## #   Glia_Density <dbl>, Astrocyte_Density <dbl>, Oligodendrocyte_Density <dbl>,
## #   Microglia_Density <dbl>, GliaNeuron_Ratio <dbl>
kable(lobe_data[, c("Lobe", "rCMRGlc_Mean", "n_regions", "Neuron_Density", "Glia_Density",
                    "Astrocyte_Density", "Oligodendrocyte_Density", "Microglia_Density")],
      caption = "Lobe-Level Aggregated Densities",
      digits = 2)
Lobe-Level Aggregated Densities
Lobe rCMRGlc_Mean n_regions Neuron_Density Glia_Density Astrocyte_Density Oligodendrocyte_Density Microglia_Density
Frontal_lobe 35.3 6 9331.71 668.29 204.74 411.20 52.35
Insular_lobe 30.3 2 9203.45 796.55 244.91 455.55 96.09
Occipital_lobe 35.8 3 9100.19 899.81 269.07 553.65 77.09
Parietal_lobe 35.8 4 9213.64 786.36 226.86 475.32 84.18

Replication Analysis: Lobe Level

cat("\n=== LOBE-LEVEL CORRELATIONS WITH rCMRGlc ===\n\n")
## 
## === LOBE-LEVEL CORRELATIONS WITH rCMRGlc ===
# Function to test correlation
test_correlation <- function(data, var_name, label) {
  valid_data <- data[!is.na(data[[var_name]]) & !is.na(data$rCMRGlc_Mean), ]

  if (nrow(valid_data) >= 3) {
    cor_test <- cor.test(valid_data$rCMRGlc_Mean, valid_data[[var_name]])
    lm_model <- lm(as.formula(paste(var_name, "~ rCMRGlc_Mean")), data = valid_data)
    lm_sum <- summary(lm_model)

    cat(sprintf("%s:\n", label))
    cat(sprintf("  n = %d\n", nrow(valid_data)))
    cat(sprintf("  r = %.3f\n", cor_test$estimate))
    cat(sprintf("  p-value = %.4f %s\n", cor_test$p.value,
                ifelse(cor_test$p.value < 0.05, "***", "")))
    cat(sprintf("  95%% CI: [%.3f, %.3f]\n", cor_test$conf.int[1], cor_test$conf.int[2]))
    cat(sprintf("  R² = %.3f\n", lm_sum$r.squared))
    cat(sprintf("  Beta = %.2e, t = %.3f\n\n", coef(lm_model)[2], lm_sum$coefficients[2, 3]))

    return(list(
      var = var_name,
      label = label,
      n = nrow(valid_data),
      r = cor_test$estimate,
      p = cor_test$p.value,
      ci_lower = cor_test$conf.int[1],
      ci_upper = cor_test$conf.int[2],
      r_squared = lm_sum$r.squared,
      beta = coef(lm_model)[2]
    ))
  }
}

# Test all densities
results_lobe <- list(
  test_correlation(lobe_data, "Neuron_Density", "Neuron Density"),
  test_correlation(lobe_data, "Glia_Density", "Total Glia Density"),
  test_correlation(lobe_data, "Astrocyte_Density", "Astrocyte Density"),
  test_correlation(lobe_data, "Oligodendrocyte_Density", "Oligodendrocyte Density"),
  test_correlation(lobe_data, "Microglia_Density", "Microglia Density"),
  test_correlation(lobe_data, "GliaNeuron_Ratio", "Glia:Neuron Ratio")
)
## Neuron Density:
##   n = 5
##   r = 0.579
##   p-value = 0.3066 
##   95% CI: [-0.620, 0.967]
##   R² = 0.335
##   Beta = 8.94e+01, t = 1.229
## 
## Total Glia Density:
##   n = 5
##   r = -0.579
##   p-value = 0.3066 
##   95% CI: [-0.967, 0.620]
##   R² = 0.335
##   Beta = -8.94e+01, t = -1.229
## 
## Astrocyte Density:
##   n = 5
##   r = -0.598
##   p-value = 0.2868 
##   95% CI: [-0.969, 0.602]
##   R² = 0.358
##   Beta = -1.62e+01, t = -1.292
## 
## Oligodendrocyte Density:
##   n = 5
##   r = -0.548
##   p-value = 0.3394 
##   95% CI: [-0.964, 0.648]
##   R² = 0.300
##   Beta = -6.10e+01, t = -1.133
## 
## Microglia Density:
##   n = 5
##   r = -0.720
##   p-value = 0.1701 
##   95% CI: [-0.980, 0.445]
##   R² = 0.519
##   Beta = -1.21e+01, t = -1.798
## 
## Glia:Neuron Ratio:
##   n = 5
##   r = -0.580
##   p-value = 0.3049 
##   95% CI: [-0.967, 0.619]
##   R² = 0.337
##   Beta = -1.18e-02, t = -1.234
# Create summary table
results_df_lobe <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_lobe, as.data.frame))
results_df_lobe <- results_df_lobe[order(results_df_lobe$p), ]

kable(results_df_lobe,
      caption = "Lobe-Level Correlation Summary (sorted by p-value)",
      digits = 4)
Lobe-Level Correlation Summary (sorted by p-value)
var label n r p ci_lower ci_upper r_squared beta
cor4 Microglia_Density Microglia Density 5 -0.7201 0.1701 -0.9798 0.4447 0.5186 -12.1010
cor2 Astrocyte_Density Astrocyte Density 5 -0.5980 0.2868 -0.9690 0.6017 0.3576 -16.2393
cor5 GliaNeuron_Ratio Glia:Neuron Ratio 5 -0.5804 0.3049 -0.9673 0.6187 0.3369 -0.0118
cor Neuron_Density Neuron Density 5 0.5788 0.3066 -0.6202 0.9672 0.3350 89.3896

Replication Analysis: Subregion Level

cat("\n=== SUBREGION-LEVEL CORRELATIONS WITH rCMRGlc ===\n\n")
## 
## === SUBREGION-LEVEL CORRELATIONS WITH rCMRGlc ===
# Test all densities at subregion level
results_subregion <- list(
  test_correlation(cellxgene_data, "Neuron_Density", "Neuron Density"),
  test_correlation(cellxgene_data, "Glia_Density", "Total Glia Density"),
  test_correlation(cellxgene_data, "Astrocyte_Density", "Astrocyte Density"),
  test_correlation(cellxgene_data, "Oligodendrocyte_Density", "Oligodendrocyte Density"),
  test_correlation(cellxgene_data, "Microglia_Density", "Microglia Density"),
  test_correlation(cellxgene_data, "GliaNeuron_Ratio", "Glia:Neuron Ratio")
)

# Create summary table
results_df_subregion <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_subregion, as.data.frame))
results_df_subregion <- results_df_subregion[order(results_df_subregion$p), ]

kable(results_df_subregion,
      caption = "Subregion-Level Correlation Summary (sorted by p-value)",
      digits = 4)

Visualization: Glial Subtypes (Lobe Level)

cb_palette <- c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442",
                "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "#999999")

# Create plots for each glial subtype
plot_list <- list()

for (i in 1:3) {
  var_info <- list(
    list(var = "Astrocyte_Density", label = "Astrocyte Density", color = 1),
    list(var = "Oligodendrocyte_Density", label = "Oligodendrocyte Density", color = 2),
    list(var = "Microglia_Density", label = "Microglia Density", color = 3)
  )[[i]]

  cor_test <- cor.test(lobe_data$rCMRGlc_Mean, lobe_data[[var_info$var]])

  p <- ggplot(lobe_data, aes(x = rCMRGlc_Mean, y = .data[[var_info$var]])) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = cb_palette[var_info$color], alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = cb_palette[var_info$color+1],
                fill = cb_palette[var_info$color+1], alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = Lobe), size = 3.5, box.padding = 0.5) +
    labs(title = var_info$label,
         subtitle = sprintf("r = %.3f, p = %.4f, n = %d lobes",
                          cor_test$estimate, cor_test$p.value, nrow(lobe_data)),
         x = "rCMRGlc (µmol/100g/min)",
         y = paste(var_info$label, "(per 10,000 cells)")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

  plot_list[[i]] <- p
}

# Add total glia plot
cor_test <- cor.test(lobe_data$rCMRGlc_Mean, lobe_data$Glia_Density)
p <- ggplot(lobe_data, aes(x = rCMRGlc_Mean, y = Glia_Density)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = cb_palette[4], alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = cb_palette[5],
              fill = cb_palette[5], alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Lobe), size = 3.5, box.padding = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Total Glia Density",
       subtitle = sprintf("r = %.3f, p = %.4f, n = %d lobes",
                        cor_test$estimate, cor_test$p.value, nrow(lobe_data)),
       x = "rCMRGlc (µmol/100g/min)",
       y = "Total Glia Density (per 10,000 cells)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

plot_list[[4]] <- p

# Combine plots
combined <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "CellxGene Replication: Glial Cell Densities vs Metabolic Rate (Lobe Level)",
    subtitle = "Whole Human Brain Atlas Data",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined)

ggsave("CellxGene_Lobe_Glia_Replication.png", combined,
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

Visualization: Glial Subtypes (Subregion Level)

# Create plots for each glial subtype at subregion level
plot_list_sub <- list()

for (i in 1:3) {
  var_info <- list(
    list(var = "Astrocyte_Density", label = "Astrocyte Density", color = 1),
    list(var = "Oligodendrocyte_Density", label = "Oligodendrocyte Density", color = 2),
    list(var = "Microglia_Density", label = "Microglia Density", color = 3)
  )[[i]]

  cor_test <- cor.test(cellxgene_data$rCMRGlc_Mean, cellxgene_data[[var_info$var]])

  p <- ggplot(cellxgene_data, aes(x = rCMRGlc_Mean, y = .data[[var_info$var]])) +
    geom_point(size = 3, color = cb_palette[var_info$color], alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = cb_palette[var_info$color+1],
                fill = cb_palette[var_info$color+1], alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = Region), size = 2.5, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 15) +
    labs(title = var_info$label,
         subtitle = sprintf("r = %.3f, p = %.4f, n = %d regions",
                          cor_test$estimate, cor_test$p.value, nrow(cellxgene_data)),
         x = "rCMRGlc",
         y = paste(var_info$label, "(per 10k cells)")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10)
    )

  plot_list_sub[[i]] <- p
}

# Add total glia plot
cor_test <- cor.test(cellxgene_data$rCMRGlc_Mean, cellxgene_data$Glia_Density)
p <- ggplot(cellxgene_data, aes(x = rCMRGlc_Mean, y = Glia_Density)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = cb_palette[4], alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = cb_palette[5],
              fill = cb_palette[5], alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Region), size = 2.5, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 15) +
  labs(title = "Total Glia Density",
       subtitle = sprintf("r = %.3f, p = %.4f, n = %d regions",
                        cor_test$estimate, cor_test$p.value, nrow(cellxgene_data)),
       x = "rCMRGlc",
       y = "Total Glia Density (per 10k cells)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10)
  )

plot_list_sub[[4]] <- p

# Combine plots
combined_sub <- wrap_plots(plot_list_sub, ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "CellxGene Replication: Glial Cell Densities vs Metabolic Rate (Subregion Level)",
    subtitle = "Whole Human Brain Atlas Data (21 cortical regions)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_sub)

ggsave("CellxGene_Subregion_Glia_Replication.png", combined_sub,
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

Comparison with Original Results

cat("\n", strrep("=", 80), "\n")
## 
##  ================================================================================
cat("COMPARISON: ORIGINAL vs CELLXGENE REPLICATION\n")
## COMPARISON: ORIGINAL vs CELLXGENE REPLICATION
cat(strrep("=", 80), "\n\n")
## ================================================================================
# Original results
original <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Astrocyte Density", "Oligodendrocyte Density", "Microglia Density", "Total Glia Density"),
  Original_r = c(0.968, 0.897, 0.937, 0.708),
  Original_p = c(0.002, 0.016, 0.006, 0.075),
  Original_n = c(6, 6, 6, 7),
  Source = c("Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan", "Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan", "Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan", "Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan")
)

# Get CellxGene lobe-level results
cellxgene_lobe <- data.frame(
  Variable = results_df_lobe$label,
  CellxGene_Lobe_r = results_df_lobe$r,
  CellxGene_Lobe_p = results_df_lobe$p,
  CellxGene_Lobe_n = results_df_lobe$n
)

# Get CellxGene subregion-level results
cellxgene_sub <- data.frame(
  Variable = results_df_subregion$label,
  CellxGene_Sub_r = results_df_subregion$r,
  CellxGene_Sub_p = results_df_subregion$p,
  CellxGene_Sub_n = results_df_subregion$n
)

# Merge for comparison
comparison <- merge(original, cellxgene_lobe, by = "Variable", all.x = TRUE)
comparison <- merge(comparison, cellxgene_sub, by = "Variable", all.x = TRUE)

# Add significance markers
comparison$Original_Sig <- ifelse(comparison$Original_p < 0.05, "***", "")
comparison$Lobe_Sig <- ifelse(comparison$CellxGene_Lobe_p < 0.05, "***", "")
comparison$Sub_Sig <- ifelse(comparison$CellxGene_Sub_p < 0.05, "***", "")

kable(comparison,
      caption = "Comparison of Original Results with CellxGene Replication",
      digits = 4)
Comparison of Original Results with CellxGene Replication
Variable Original_r Original_p Original_n Source CellxGene_Lobe_r CellxGene_Lobe_p CellxGene_Lobe_n CellxGene_Sub_r CellxGene_Sub_p CellxGene_Sub_n Original_Sig Lobe_Sig Sub_Sig
Astrocyte Density 0.968 0.002 6 Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan -0.5980 0.2868 5 -0.3485 0.1322 20 ***
Microglia Density 0.937 0.006 6 Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan -0.7201 0.1701 5 -0.6038 0.0048 20 *** ***
Oligodendrocyte Density 0.897 0.016 6 Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan -0.5476 0.3394 5 -0.4232 0.0630 20 ***
Total Glia Density 0.708 0.075 7 Hanson/Karlsen/Morgan -0.5788 0.3066 5 -0.4363 0.0545 20 
cat("\n=== INTERPRETATION ===\n\n")
## 
## === INTERPRETATION ===
cat("The CellxGene data provides an independent validation of the original findings:\n\n")
## The CellxGene data provides an independent validation of the original findings:
if (any(cellxgene_lobe$CellxGene_Lobe_p[1:3] < 0.05)) {
  cat("✓ REPLICATED: Glial subtype densities show relationships with rCMRGlc\n")
} else {
  cat("✗ NOT REPLICATED: Glial subtype densities do not show significant relationships\n")
}
## ✗ NOT REPLICATED: Glial subtype densities do not show significant relationships
if (cellxgene_lobe$CellxGene_Lobe_p[cellxgene_lobe$Variable == "Total Glia Density"] >= 0.05) {
  cat("✓ CONFIRMED: Total glia density remains non-significant (consistent with original)\n")
} else {
  cat("✗ DIFFERENT: Total glia density IS significant in CellxGene data\n")
}
## ✓ CONFIRMED: Total glia density remains non-significant (consistent with original)
cat("\n", strrep("=", 80), "\n")
## 
##  ================================================================================

Summary

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n\n")
## 
## === ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===
cat("FILES CREATED:\n")
## FILES CREATED:
cat("- CellxGene_Lobe_Glia_Replication.png\n")
## - CellxGene_Lobe_Glia_Replication.png
cat("- CellxGene_Subregion_Glia_Replication.png\n\n")
## - CellxGene_Subregion_Glia_Replication.png
cat("This analysis used single-cell RNA-seq data from the Whole Human Brain Atlas\n")
## This analysis used single-cell RNA-seq data from the Whole Human Brain Atlas
cat("(CellxGene) to independently validate findings from traditional histology studies.\n\n")
## (CellxGene) to independently validate findings from traditional histology studies.
cat("Sample size comparison:\n")
## Sample size comparison:
cat("- Original: 6-7 brain regions from 3 papers\n")
## - Original: 6-7 brain regions from 3 papers
cat("- CellxGene Lobe: 5 lobes\n")
## - CellxGene Lobe: 5 lobes
cat("- CellxGene Subregion: 21 cortical subregions\n\n")
## - CellxGene Subregion: 21 cortical subregions
